title: Nengella rhopalocarpa
taxonomy: Nengella rhopalocarpa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to New Guinea. Further classification places it in the order Celastrales and the subclass Rosidae. The Celastraceae family comprises approximately 95 genera and 1,000 species. These plants are often found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
